title: Pack of 4 Jet Lighters, Windproof Gas Lighter Butane Refillable Lighters, Jet Flame Torch Lighter - without Butane
features: Pack of 4 – Large fuel tank, safety lock, and effortless flame adjustment, perfect for BBQ, cookers and candles.
Large Gas Tank ► Large, clear fuel chamber for easy tracking and extended use – never run out unexpectedly again!
Safety Lock ► Safety lock prevents accidental ignition. Lock it during use for a continuous jet flame without holding the button.
Effortless Flame Adjustment ► Effortlessly adjust the jet flame with the large top knob – no tools required.
Lifetime Warranty & Support ► A lifetime of confidence. With GIFTorch, you’re choosing lasting quality. If anything happens, we’ve got you covered—no hassle, no questions, just reliable support.
Note: Sold without gas. Please add butane gas before first use.
